zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Tibbals於1654年11月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德時，她的父親Thomas Tibbals41歲，母親Mary Debell30歲。她於1677年6月3日與Daniel Collins Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1712年6月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Tibbals于1654年11月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德时，她的父亲Thomas Tibbals41岁，母亲Mary Debell30岁。她于1677年6月3日与Daniel Collins Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1712年6月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tibbals
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tibbles
meanings: English (Hertfordshire): variant of Tibble , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Tibbals was born on 27 November 1654, in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Tibbals, was 41 and her mother, Mary Debell, was 30. She married Daniel Collins Sr on 3 June 1677, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 June 1712, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Tibbals est née le 27 novembre 1654, à Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Tibbals, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary Debell, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Daniel Collins Sr le 3 juin 1677, à Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 juin 1712, à Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Tibbals am 27. November 1654 in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Tibbals 41 und ihre Mutter Mary Debell 30. Sie hat am 3. Juni 1677 in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Daniel Collins Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Juni 1712 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Tibbals è nata il il 27 novembre 1654 nel Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Tibbals, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mary Debell, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Daniel Collins Sr il 3 giugno 1677, nel Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 giugno 1712, nel Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Tibbalsが1654年11月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Tibbalsは41歳，母Mary Debellは30歳であった。1677年6月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドでDaniel Collins Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1712年6月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドで57歳で死去した。

ko.Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Tibbals(이)가 1654년 11월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Tibbals(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Debell(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1677년 6월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 Daniel Collins Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1712년 6월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Tibbals nasceu em 27 de novembro de 1654, em Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Tibbals, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Debell, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Daniel Collins Sr em 3 de junho de 1677, em Enfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de junho de 1712, em Enfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Tibbals родилась 27 ноября 1654 г. в местности милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Tibbals было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Debell, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniel Collins Sr 3 июня 1677 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 июня 1712 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Daniel Collins Sr el 3 de junio de 1677, en Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas.
